summary: Created ExplorationRLAdapter (CJS) bridging ModelComprehensionMemory performance data into SkillRLManager learning. Queries model_performance SQLite table by intent_category, computes composite scores (accuracy, latency, cost, success_rate, reasoning_efficiency), feeds results to skillRLManager.recordOutcome(). Exported from opencode-skill-rl-manager/src/index.js. Unblocks adaptive routing Phase 7 integration.
